questionHtml: Explain why an increase in temperature reduces the rate of an enzyme-catalyzed reaction.
markschemeHtml:
enzyme denatured/ loss of 3-D structure/conformational change
OR
«interactions responsible for» for tertiary/quaternary structures altered  [✔]

shape of active site changes
OR
fewer substrate molecules fit into active sites  [✔]

meta.title: Explain why an increase in temperature reduces the rate of an enzyme-catalyzed reaction.
